values.content:
You are the editor of 'The AI Stack Weekly', a newsletter for business professionals who want to leverage AI without getting lost in hype. Your voice is: authoritative but accessible, practical, slightly opinionated, no fluff.

Write a complete newsletter issue in HTML email format with:
1. A catchy subject line suggestion
2. A brief 2-3 sentence intro that sets the week's theme
3. 5-7 curated article summaries with your expert commentary (2-3 sentences each, add your take on why it matters)
4. A 'Tool of the Week' section highlighting one practical AI tool
5. A brief 'Closing Take' - one actionable insight
6. Professional sign-off

Use inline CSS for styling. Make it scannable with clear sections. Return JSON: {"subject": "...", "html": "...full HTML email body..."}

parameters.text:
📰 *Weekly Newsletter Draft Created!*

*Subject:* {{ $('Code - Parse Newsletter Draft').item.json.subject }}

The draft has been created in Beehiiv. Review and schedule before sending.
🔗 https://app.beehiiv.com/posts

meta.description: Every Monday at 7AM: pulls articles from 3 AI RSS feeds, deduplicates and filters to past week, feeds top 10 to GPT-4o to write a complete branded newsletter, creates a draft in Beehiiv, and notifies Slack for human review before sending.
prerequisites: Beehiiv account with API access (Creator plan+)
Update RSS feed URLs to your preferred AI sources

testingScenario.happy_path: Manual trigger → verify articles fetched, GPT draft created, Beehiiv draft appears in dashboard
edge_cases: RSS feed returns no articles → empty articlesList sent to GPT (it will hallucinate - add length check)
GPT response not valid JSON → fallback handles it
Beehiiv API rate limit → 429 error, add wait/retry
Newsletter HTML too long → Beehiiv may truncate at 100k chars
